round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent had no Round 1 content to improve upon.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent acknowledged and integrated cross-agent evidence (Botanics, Meta) to reinforce its initial conclusion, though the conclusion did not change.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent acknowledged and integrated cross-agent evidence (Landscape, Regulatory, Meta) to reinforce its initial conclusion, though the conclusion did not change.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent acknowledged and integrated cross-agent evidence (Landscape, Botanics, Meta) to reinforce its initial conclusion, though the conclusion did not change.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent acknowledged and integrated cross-agent evidence (Landscape, Botanics, Regulatory) to reinforce its initial conclusion, though the conclusion did not change.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence from all agents. It noted the absence of linguistic evidence and effectively used the convergence of landscape, botany, regulatory, and meta evidence to confirm Brazil while ruling out Mexico. The reasoning is clear and well-supported.
